rationale: Two line edits in README.md inside the Enterprise Integration section: the PowerShell Task Scheduler example switches the executable path from C:\Program Files\Windows-MTR\mtr.exe to C:\Tools\windows-mtr\mtr.exe and drops the non-existent -o output.txt flag, and the Centralized Monitoring bash example replaces --reporter json --log-level info with --json -c 10. PR body explains both flags do not exist in the binary and that the correct flags are -j/--json and -c, with claimed verification against src/main.rs. Docs-only change with no test, assertion, or code logic at risk.
